module.name: src
module.purpose: Rust workspace source root for Marix crates with flat Cargo crate layout. It organizes reusable common config/external/logging/protocol/structure modules, agent model/session/task orchestration, client session/event surfaces, host-side typed tool execution, and the top-level tool crate. The common protocol namespace includes TaskSignature::new, ExecutionSignature::new, and StepSignature::new constructors, SessionEvent with Step(StepSignature, StepEvent), TaskEvent without a Step variant, TaskPreview, TaskRequestBrief, ToolSchema with typed ToolInputSchema/ToolOutputSchema content wrappers, and ExecutionRequest with signature plus typed input. Client task creation uses TaskSignature::new for fresh task ids while cancellation preserves existing ids, agent task initialization uses StepSignature::new, and agent preview queries use ExecutionSignature::new.

childModules.name: agent
childModules.purpose: Agent crate namespace for model/session/task orchestration, including StepSignature::new initial model-step construction and ExecutionSignature::new host-preview queries.

childModules.name: client
childModules.purpose: Client crate namespace for ClientSession and ClientEvent. create_task uses TaskSignature::new for fresh task ids, while cancel_task preserves the caller-provided TaskId via a struct literal.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared common crate namespace with protocol constructors for TaskSignature, ExecutionSignature, and StepSignature plus reusable config, external, logging, protocol, and structure modules.

childModules.name: host
childModules.purpose: Host crate namespace for HostSession and host-side tool execution. Host execution routes ExecutionRequest.input.content through selected tools and exposes typed schema content through Tool input_schema/output_schema helpers.

childModules.name: tool
childModules.purpose: Top-level marix-tool crate (lib marix_tool) that defines ToolProgram and native tool executables; native previews wrap schema constants in ToolInputSchema/ToolOutputSchema content before returning ToolPreview.
